# render-diff

Diff renderer for the contributions facet in the PR review pane. Contributes a
`DiffRenderer` that projects each plugin's static contributions to `slot "id"`
strings (via `contributionsToComparable` in the facet `core/`) so the host can
diff a plugin's contributions between the worktree and main.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Diff renderer for the contributions facet (PR review).
- Disabled: cascade
- Web:
  - Contributes: `PluginChangesSlots.DiffRenderer` "Contributions"
  - Uses: `review/plugin-changes.PluginChangesSlots`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
